name: Just Survive
description: Just Survive is a post-apocalyptic survival game that immerses you in a world where humanity is fighting to take back control from the zombie hordes.
requirements:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows 7, 8, 8.1, 10 (64 bit only)
  • Processor: Intel i3 Dual-Core with Hyper-Threading (required)
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: nVidia GeForce GTX 275 series or higher / AMD Radeon HD 4870 X2 series or higher
  • DirectX: Version 10
  • Network: Broadband Internet connection
  • Storage: 20 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectX Compatible Sound Card
comment1: How is this game still on steam is beyond me what a waste of data and information for the universe at large.
